description.value:
Except for queens, most formians possess little in the way of inherent magical ability. You're no queen, but you're in close proximity with your queen as a member of her court, and she often channels her magic through your close telepathic bond.

You can cast @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Force Barrage] and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Translocate] as 4th-rank primal innate spells once per day each. For 1 minute after casting either spell, the range of your @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.ancestry-features.Item.Limited Telepathy] quadruples.
